name: finance-ev-overview
description: Use web_search to search for 'electric vehicle market size growth 2025 2026 global sales'. Summarize the global EV market in 3 bullet points. Include total sales figures. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer:
- Global EV sales reached approximately 20.7 million units in 2025, a ~20-25% increase year-over-year, with more than one in four cars sold being electric.
- China dominates with over 14 million EV sales (60% of global volume), while the US grew just 1% after federal tax credit expiration; Europe became the fastest-growing major region.
- The market is projected to reach 27.5% of global vehicle sales in 2026, with over 1,000 EV models expected to be available.
key_facts: Global EV sales reached approximately 20.7 million units in 2025, up about 20-25% year-over-year
China accounts for roughly 60% of global EV sales and produces 71% of all EVs sold worldwide
More than one in four cars sold globally in 2025 was electric
EV market share is projected to reach 27.5% in 2026
US EV sales grew only 1% in 2025 after the September 2025 federal tax credit expiration
